---
title: "Schedule & Materials"
format: html
toc: true
---

This is the official course schedule. Materials are typically posted **before each lecture**.
Deadlines are listed in **local time (Asia/Riyadh)**.

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
### How to use this page
- **Slides/notes**: posted per lecture.
- **Readings**: optional unless explicitly marked as required.
- **Deadlines**: always cross-check the [Homework](homework.qmd) and [Project](project/index.qmd) pages.
:::

---

## Week 1 

| Date | Topic | Materials | Deadlines |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Jan 11** | **Course overview** | [Slides (PDF)](https://kfupmedusa-my.sharepoint.com/:b:/g/personal/albeladi_kfupm_edu_sa/IQDkE6K_xKNdTbgwkycPnKGNAXUg3OIx-EUd5zHeSedb2HA?e=gX3JHU){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary} |  |
| **Jan 13** | **Slam in R2** | [Slides (PDF)](https://kfupmedusa-my.sharepoint.com/:b:/g/personal/albeladi_kfupm_edu_sa/IQCpalXiMnTdR5mqPtHowerHAfZCgNacEFNVXaTb-3j13H0?e=df8Ht8){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary} |  |

---

## Week 2 

| Date | Topic | Materials | Deadlines |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Jan 18** | **Essential Probabilities Background** | [Slides (PDF)](https://kfupmedusa-my.sharepoint.com/:b:/g/personal/albeladi_kfupm_edu_sa/IQC6P3VVWUZmSpRPb8seE6NJAVD9Wti3qOWX1--B-tUHOZA?e=EGbkub){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary} |  |
| **Jan 20** | **Probabilistic SLAM in R2** | [Slides (PDF)](https://kfupmedusa-my.sharepoint.com/:b:/g/personal/albeladi_kfupm_edu_sa/IQBETO_2j4RcRp1gGjznHaKFAXwcv2dMW0TVEJwJUrSUzrs?e=C4nUwV){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary} |  |

---

## Week 3 

| Date | Topic | Materials | Deadlines |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Jan 25** | **Filtering vs. Smoothing** | [Slides (PDF)](https://kfupmedusa-my.sharepoint.com/:b:/g/personal/albeladi_kfupm_edu_sa/IQCtWnJSDiCkTJJfCPFZ-kKmAeYmMgx1wkpKDv0uTctIZYo?e=y6BnbR){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary} | [HW1 out](homework.qmd){.btn .btn-sm .btn-warning} |
| **Jan 27** | **Rigid-body transformations** | [Slides (PDF)](https://kfupmedusa-my.sharepoint.com/:b:/g/personal/albeladi_kfupm_edu_sa/IQC5GmwbJSS3QLV9tz6hm0A1AStxVPBQkPye9JKRd_pfDl4?e=N6tLKA){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary} <br> Reading: [[LP] Chp. 3.1](policy.qmd#textbooks)  |  |

---

## Week 4 

| Date | Topic | Materials | Deadlines |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Feb 1** | **Differential kinematics** | [Slides (PDF)](https://kfupmedusa-my.sharepoint.com/:b:/g/personal/albeladi_kfupm_edu_sa/IQB05iYDV_HaS7pXvBQfYKMuAVKoRlft4mwluTf-rhRHPtE?e=hqeG3o){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary} <br> Reading: [LP] Chp. 3.2 |  |
| **Feb 3** | **SE(2) and SE(3)** | [Slides (PDF)](https://kfupmedusa-my.sharepoint.com/:b:/g/personal/albeladi_kfupm_edu_sa/IQAIXoxPBtw3TpnwSWs1sGg6AXthRs027QHv0-uUDFqF2_I?e=T8PpPY){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary} <br> Reading: [LP] Chp. 3.3 | [HW1 due Feb. 7](homework.qmd){.btn .btn-sm .btn-warning} |

---

## Week 5 

| Date | Topic | Materials | Deadlines |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Feb 8** | **Uncertainty in SE(3) 1** | [Slides (PDF)](https://kfupmedusa-my.sharepoint.com/:b:/g/personal/albeladi_kfupm_edu_sa/IQCju6s2nueZTrO48BzexQiJAdZE_4Umr0nmpmg6GKjwW9o?e=QgQJMM){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary}  |  |
| **Feb 10** | **Uncertainty in SE(3) 2** | [Slides (PDF)](https://kfupmedusa-my.sharepoint.com/:b:/g/personal/albeladi_kfupm_edu_sa/IQD_XYCYigZ_QqH7DndeqvAGAeCfKeWAhAbrIqVN_-EQNtM?e=42CcaR){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary} | [HW2 out](homework.qmd){.btn .btn-sm .btn-warning} |

---

## Week 6 

| Date | Topic | Materials | Deadlines |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Feb 15** | **Uncertainty in SE(3) 3** | [Slides (PDF)](https://kfupmedusa-my.sharepoint.com/:b:/g/personal/albeladi_kfupm_edu_sa/IQDmKx0I-5mGRLB-zj_14HcvAb8sllz6ns7uK5kad4CAZI8?e=qcnmCx){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary}  |  |
| **Feb 17** | **Linear Optimization** | [Slides (PDF)](https://kfupmedusa-my.sharepoint.com/:b:/g/personal/albeladi_kfupm_edu_sa/IQBccdEg2YqdR5APCIO9zCvDAQFyf7T2zNclm4Jt-uUOKEM?e=MWraiz){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary}  | |

---

## Week 7

| Date | Topic | Materials | Deadlines |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Feb 22** | **Holiday** |  |  |
| **Feb 24** | **NonLinear Optimization** | [Slides (PDF)](https://kfupmedusa-my.sharepoint.com/:b:/g/personal/albeladi_kfupm_edu_sa/IQCXZwuHSJHxSJiduU9xe56aAVIQYeVpFiNjQYYgTYKFBKU?e=TmWi5i){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary}  | |

---

## Week 8

| Date | Topic | Materials | Deadlines |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Mar 1** | **No Class** |  |  |
| **Mar 3** | **NonLinear Optimization** | [Slides (PDF)](https://kfupmedusa-my.sharepoint.com/:b:/g/personal/albeladi_kfupm_edu_sa/IQCqeM7F86JURbgE7UGzfKDyAWMdBmsotIkA9C1nqZKd0R0?e=A2wVl1){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary}  | |

---

## Week 9

| Date | Topic | Materials | Deadlines |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Mar 8** | **NonLinear Optimization** |  |  |
| **Mar 10** | **No Class** |  | [Proposal due](project/proposal.qmd){.btn .btn-sm .btn-danger} |

---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
### Mid-semester break
**Mar 15 – Mar 27** — No classes.
:::

---

## Week 10

| Date | Topic | Materials | Deadlines |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Mar 29** | **Point Cloud Registration** |  [Slides (PDF)](https://kfupmedusa-my.sharepoint.com/:p:/g/personal/albeladi_kfupm_edu_sa/IQDEoarsm9IbTphQnzHsp4tJAVUjzNCDBVIoWFGaT1VY5Fg?e=ZY4kl3){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary}|  |
| **Mar 31** | **Occupancy Grid Mapping** | [Slides (PDF)](https://kfupmedusa-my.sharepoint.com/:b:/g/personal/albeladi_kfupm_edu_sa/IQBX_bwUrWuWTK3TANGQG61gAQBK8_E8HeMBI1-e1odnSfA?e=LY1DoJ){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary} |  |

---

## Week 11

| Date | Topic | Materials | Deadlines |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Apr 5** | **Camera Model**| [Slides (PDF)](https://kfupmedusa-my.sharepoint.com/:b:/g/personal/albeladi_kfupm_edu_sa/IQCqU_BBlZrRSbvEJ4d575grAYlIsamWrxxrYAbMNR6Q9Xk?e=vfQtW7){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary} |  | 
| **Apr 7** | **Visual Odometry**| [Slides (PDF)](https://kfupmedusa-my.sharepoint.com/:b:/g/personal/albeladi_kfupm_edu_sa/IQAdttFH9RCPSqtKt3WUKUV_AYfyD_6V2Kzk4mwUwV1dl98?e=75oghC){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary} |  |  |

---

## Week 12

| Date | Topic | Materials | Deadlines |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Apr 12** | **Project Progress Presentations**| | [Progress report due](project/index.qmd){.btn .btn-sm .btn-danger} | 
| **Apr 14** | **Robustness to Outliers** | [Slides (PDF)](https://kfupmedusa-my.sharepoint.com/:b:/g/personal/albeladi_kfupm_edu_sa/IQBp_0YNC1O8SrIUYUMTYg2vAYetos77tes5Dwf0vxteSqU?e=JP6LA4){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary}  |  |

---

## Week 13

| Date | Topic | Materials | Deadlines |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Apr 19** |  |  |  |
| **Apr 21** |  |  |  |

---

## Week 14

| Date | Topic | Materials | Deadlines |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Apr 26** |  |  |  |
| **Apr 28** |  |  |  |

---

## Week 15

| Date | Topic | Materials | Deadlines |
|---|---|---|---|
| **May 3** |  |  |  |
| **May 5** |  |  | [Final report due May 12](project/final.qmd){.btn .btn-sm .btn-danger} |

::: {.callout-warning appearance="minimal"}
### Access note (if using SharePoint links)
If a file link does not open, ensure you are logged in with your **KFUPM** account in the same browser.
:::
